nasb.text: Having been prompted by her mother, she *said, “Give me here on a platter the head of John the Baptist.”

esv.text: Prompted by her mother, she said, “Give me the head of John the Baptist here on a platter.”

cnv.text: 她在母親的慫恿之下，說：“請把施洗的約翰的頭放在盤子上給我。”

ccb.text: 她受了母亲的指使，说：“请把施洗者约翰的头放在盘子里送给我。”

csbs.text: 女儿受母亲的指使，就说：“请把施洗者约翰的头放在盘子里给我。”
